message:
The other night, we had a surprise blackout, and let me tell you, I was feeling like the gloriously over-prepared person in the neighborhood! I had my flashlights ready, power banks charged, and a couple of lanterns on standby. My family thought I was a little extra, but when the lights went out, they quickly changed their tune! 

We gathered in the living room, illuminated by the soft glow of our lanterns, and it felt oddly cozy. We played cards and shared stories—there was laughter and connection that sometimes gets lost in our busy lives. It reminded me that a little preparation can turn an unexpected situation into a cherished memory. 

So, how do you like to keep the good vibes flowing during a power outage? This little refresher helped me feel prepared and ready for anything!
